title: Tarquinas
content:
{{Top|ncl|italics=1}}
{{Noncanon|legends=1}}
[[File:Tarquinas.jpg|thumb|200px]]

The '''''Tarquinas''''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttle]] assigned to the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''Tarquinas'' was also the name of a server - or "Galaxy" - in [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']] prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars Infinities: A New Hope 2|''Star Wars Infinities: A New Hope'' 2]]
